title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kale Consultants South Asia Partners in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
